title: token query param appears in access logs despite redact_token_query_param middleware
description: main.rs adds redact_token_query_param middleware only to the browser_auth_routes layer (/ws/events and /jmap/eventsource/). The middleware is conditional on TRACE logging and does NOT mutate the URI — it only logs a redacted version. If a tracing TraceLayer is added in the future (common axum middleware), the original URI with the token will be logged by TraceLayer BEFORE redact_token_query_param runs (middleware ordering). The comment says 'token is stripped from the request URI by a middleware layer' which is inaccurate — it is not stripped, it is only conditionally logged at TRACE. Fix: clarify the comment and consider adding Content-Security-Policy or actual URI mutation if token logging is a real concern.
